title: Principal Frontend Developer at Texas Instruments India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Texas Instruments India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Texas Instruments India International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Texas Instruments India International Enterprises:
Texas Instruments India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Texas Instruments India International Enterprises!
